backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that defines Game and Show types, holds hardcoded arrays of two games and two shows, and exposes public query functions to retrieve them. Also includes a blob storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (dark theme, navigation, proxy, games, shows sections) to their corresponding source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document providing one-sentence descriptions of each frontend source file, serving as a quick reference for the purpose and content of every component, hook, and config file.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes including background, foreground, card, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the NexHub app with title, viewport meta, description meta, and a root div that loads the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that assembles the full page layout by composing Navigation, HeroSection, ProxySection, GamesSection, ShowsSection, and Footer with anchor-based section IDs.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the NexHub logo, section navigation links with neon accent colors, a caffeine.ai attribution link, and a dynamic copyright year.
frontend/src/components/GameCard.tsx: Card component for a single game entry showing a thumbnail or emoji fallback, title, description, hover play overlay, and a neon-green styled Play Now button.
frontend/src/components/GamePlayer.tsx: Full-screen modal overlay that renders a sandboxed iframe for playing a browser game, with a header showing the game title, open-in-new-tab button, and Escape-to-close support.
frontend/src/components/GamesSection.tsx: Games section component that merges backend game data with six hardcoded fallback games, renders them in a responsive grid of GameCards, and manages the active GamePlayer modal state.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Renders the full-screen hero section with a background gradient, glow orbs, logo, headline, tagline, and three CTA buttons (Proxy, Games, Shows) that smooth-scroll to their respective sections.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with scroll-aware active section highlighting, a logo, desktop nav links, and a collapsible mobile menu for Proxy, Games, and Shows sections.
frontend/src/components/ProxySection.tsx: Web proxy section with a URL input bar that loads the entered URL in an embedded iframe, with refresh and clear controls and basic URL validation.
frontend/src/components/ShowCard.tsx: Card component for a single show displaying a thumbnail (or emoji fallback), title, description, and a 'Watch Now' button that triggers the parent's onWatch callback.
frontend/src/components/ShowsSection.tsx: Shows section that fetches shows from the backend, merges them with hardcoded YouTube fallback entries, renders a grid of ShowCards with loading skeletons, and opens a VideoPlayer modal on selection.
frontend/src/components/VideoPlayer.tsx: Full-screen modal video player that embeds a show's URL in an iframe, supports Escape-key and backdrop-click to close, and provides open-in-new-tab and close buttons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports two React Query hooks, useGetAllGames and useGetAllShows, that fetch game and show data from the backend actor respectively.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines OKLCH-based dark-theme CSS custom properties (colors, neon accents, radius), and adds hero gradient and grid pattern utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider, mounting it to the root DOM element.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH color tokens, neon accent colors, border radii, neon box shadows, Space Grotesk/Inter fonts, and accordion animations, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the current version, feature list, architectural notes, and image requirements for a dark-themed site featuring a web proxy, browser games, and streaming shows.
